overview.short: Nakoda Mewa Nagar is a village in the Barmer District of the Indian state of Rajasthan.
overview.description: Nakoda Mewa Nagar is a village in the Barmer District of the Indian state of Rajasthan. The village name is Mewanagar in the Rajasthan state Government records. This village was known by the names of Nagara, Viramapura, and Maheva at different times in its history. It gained popularity as Nakoda after the construction of the Nakoda Parshva Jain temple.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Balotra
topPlaces.description: Balotra is a city situated in the Balotra district within the state of Rajasthan, India. Previously, it was located in the Barmer district of the Indian state of Rajasthan.

topPlaces.name: Khed Temple
topPlaces.description: Khed Temple, popularly known as the Kher Ranchhoreray Krishna Temple, is located in Khed, Balotra district of Rajasthan.

topPlaces.name: Khed, Rajasthan
topPlaces.description: Khed/Kher is a village in Balotra District, of Rajasthan, India. It is 9 km from Balotra and situated on Baytu-Balotra Road.

topPlaces.name: Dandali
topPlaces.description: Dandali (डंडाली) is a village in Sindhari tehsil in the Balotra district of Rajasthan state, India. It belongs to Jodhpur Division.

topPlaces.name: Majivala
topPlaces.description: Majivala village in Pachpadra tehsil of Balotra district in Rajasthan, India. As of the 2011 India census, the total population of the village is 5882.

topPlaces.name: Bithuja
topPlaces.description: Bithuja is a village in Balotra taluk, Balotra district, Rajasthan, India. Bithooja has a total population of 4,870 peoples according to Census 2011.

topPlaces.name: Mewa Nagar
topPlaces.description: Mewa Nagar is a village in Pachpadra tehsil of Balotra District, Rajasthan, India.

topPlaces.name: Nakodaji
topPlaces.description: Nakodaji Tirth is a major Śvetāmbara Jain tirth (pilgrimage site) of Tirthankara Parshwanatha in the Indian state of Rajasthan, located between the villages of Vikrampura and Nakoda in Barmer District. The temple houses the icon of Nakoda Bhairava, a prominent Śvetāmbara guardian deity.

items.note: Balotra is a city situated in the Balotra district within the state of Rajasthan, India. Previously, it was located in the Barmer district of the Indian state of Rajasthan.
Khed Temple, popularly known as the Kher Ranchhoreray Krishna Temple, is located in Khed, Balotra district of Rajasthan.
Khed/Kher is a village in Balotra District, of Rajasthan, India. It is 9 km from Balotra and situated on Baytu-Balotra Road.
Dandali (डंडाली) is a village in Sindhari tehsil in the Balotra district of Rajasthan state, India. It belongs to Jodhpur Division.
Majivala village in Pachpadra tehsil of Balotra district in Rajasthan, India. As of the 2011 India census, the total population of the village is 5882.
Bithuja is a village in Balotra taluk, Balotra district, Rajasthan, India. Bithooja has a total population of 4,870 peoples according to Census 2011.
Mewa Nagar is a village in Pachpadra tehsil of Balotra District, Rajasthan, India.

Nakodaji Tirth is a major Śvetāmbara Jain tirth (pilgrimage site) of Tirthankara Parshwanatha in the Indian state of Rajasthan, located between the villages of Vikrampura and Nakoda in Barmer District. The temple houses the icon of Nakoda Bhairava, a prominent Śvetāmbara guardian deity.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nakoda?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nakoda is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

The nearest airport is Jodhpur Airport (95 km) and the nearest railway station is Jodhpur Junction (96 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nakoda?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nakoda at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nakoda?
faq.a: Stays in Nakoda start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nakoda?
faq.a: The top attractions are Balotra, Khed Temple, Khed, Rajasthan, Dandali, Majivala.
